scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run db:migrate --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
scripts.build:vercel: cd server && npx prisma generate && if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then npx prisma db push --skip-generate; fi && if [ "$SEED_ON_BUILD" = "true" ]; then node prisma/seed.js; fi && cd ../client && npx vite build
